meta.source: Adventurer and Slime game Sprites — SLIME04
meta.attribution: Adventurer and Slime game Sprites — Segel, https://opengameart.org/content/adventurer-and-slime-game-sprites
meta.notes: Upstream ships per-frame 1333×936 PNG canvases. Every frame was cropped to the fixed union bounding rect (x 276..818, y 444..799) across the idle/move/attack sets and box-filter downscaled ÷4 into uniform 136×89 cells, preserving the in-canvas baseline so all strips share one ground line. The jump strip re-extracts the airborne hop arc of the attack lunge (frames 1-4) — the slime has no dedicated jump animation upstream; same single-source re-extraction approach as the Owl pack.
